title: Combinational Logic Design Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the design process and components of a combinational circuit, from problem statement to final implementation.
relationships: Map inputs to outputs for all combinations
Derive an expression from the truth table (e.g., SOP/POS)
Simplify the expression (e.g., using Karnaugh Maps)
Draw the circuit using basic gates (AND, OR, NOT, etc.)
